note: Hand-written by the builder, 2026-07-17. expected_chunk_id is the chunk id from corpus/chunks.json that honestly best answers the question, based on the actual chunk text -- not reverse-engineered from what the retriever returns. expected_chunk_id: null means the question is deliberately out-of-corpus or ambiguous and the retriever is expected to REFUSE (score below REFUSAL_THRESHOLD), not return any chunk.

questions.note: Deliberately out-of-corpus: this needs combining the 8-month minimum with a rule not in this corpus (whether any exception applies to sub-8-month programs). Included to test that the retriever doesn't overconfidently match on 'PGWP' keyword overlap alone.
